productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Vivus Black Shoe
description: A perfect wear for the gym or cardio class, the nike women's Air Vivus Ltr shoe is constructed using Diamond flex technology for multi-directional flexibility to give a greater Fit, more support and better traction. A sleek and comfortable performance training shoe for the athlete looking for extra support, cushioning and flexibility, this shoe comes as a versatile package.Upper Perforated synthetic upper with stitched overlays for added durability and ventilation Cushioned collar with a narrow central lacing for snug fit and protection from blistering Synthetic tongue with mesh upper and textile lining for added comfort nike swoosh on the sides for style Midsole Soft, arched footbed for an ergonomic fit Full length phylon midsole for ultimate lightweight feel and cushioning against impact Outsole Forefoot support frame for an enhanced fit and support, allowing easy twisting movements of the foot Durable rubber outsole for improved traction Nike Diamond flex technology for multi-directional flexibility Protective tip overlay for enhanced shoe life Nike Air technology in the heel cup for superior traction Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
